en: Do you speak American English or British English?
ko: 미국 영어를 써? 영국 영어를 써?

en: He is taking a shower. He is having a shower.
ko: He is taking a shower. He is having a shower

en: Fill in the gap. I usually go swimming the weekend.
ko: 빈칸을 채워봐. 나는 보통 주말에 수영을 가

en: I usually go swimming on the weekend.
ko: I usually go swimming on the weekend. I usually go swimming at the weekend

en: I usually go swimming at the weekend.
ko: I usually go swimming on the weekend. I usually go swimming at the weekend

en: Fill in the gap. I've used to it.

ko: I've gotten used to it. I've got used to it

en: I've got used to it. How do you say this date?
Fill in the gap. I studied science university.

ko: I studied science in university. I studied science at university.
I studied science in university. I studied science at university.

en: Did you answer most of these questions in American English or British English?
ko: 미국 영어로 대부분 답했어? 영국 영어로 답했어? 댓글로 알려줘
미국 영어로 대부분 답했어? 영국 영어로 답했어? 댓글로 알려줘
